Static browser utility

Hex Text Spark

Inspect exact UTF-8 bytes, decode pasted hex safely, and recover from malformed input without leaving the page.

Runs locally

No network conversion

Fatal UTF-8 decode

Examples

Start with real input

Load ASCII, multilingual UTF-8, or failure cases to see how the tool behaves.

Formatting

Hex display controls

Source or result

UTF-8 text

Source
0 characters

Text stays local. Empty input returns an empty hex state.

Input or formatted output

Hex bytes

Output
0 bytes

Formatted preview

Invalid characters and malformed UTF-8 are reported separately.

Ready

Enter text or hex, or load an example to start.
